_comment: Default fp status registry (fp's built-in statuses). Copy + edit per project to mirror .fp/extensions/workflow.ts. Order = display + sort order. role: open=active work, done=terminal complete, rejected=terminal won't-do (both done+rejected satisfy a dependency); any other role (e.g. deferred) is neither open nor satisfying. color: a semantic name (neutral/grey/blue/indigo/purple/teal/mint/green/amber/orange/red) or a raw #hex / var(--x).
